hero.lede: Several models discuss the task and converge on the best solution — you get an answer assembled and verified by Consensia.
hero.motionToggleTitle: Only animates the background 3D layer, not the page

topUp.checkoutUrlError: Stripe checkout URL was not received

idea.label: Idea
idea.text: One task — different model viewpoints, then consolidation into a shared conclusion.

difference.label: Difference
difference.text: Not button-based voting, but an exchange of arguments and clarifications between models.

result.label: Result
result.text: Fewer random mistakes and fewer confident inaccuracies from a single model.

how.title: How it works
how.lead: Three steps from request to an answer that passed an internal check.

request.title: Request
request.text: You describe the task — just like with a regular assistant.

dialog.title: Model dialogue
dialog.text: Several neural networks exchange conclusions and refine each other.

result.title: Outcome
result.text: Consensia returns one aligned, verified answer.

features.title: Capabilities
features.lead: Everything you need to trust the answer — not only the text, but also the path to it.

depth.title: Depth
depth.text: Weak spots of one model are offset by the strengths of another.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.text: You can see how the final result was reached — not a black box, but collaborative reasoning.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: Focused on one best answer, not a stream of conflicting versions.

cases.title: Where it helps
cases.lead: Any task where accuracy, multiple perspectives, and careful wording matter.

code.title: Code and architecture
code.text: Review ideas, find edge cases, align style, and account for stack constraints.

writing.title: Writing and communication
writing.text: Emails, documents, and tone of voice — when nuance matters.

analytics.title: Analytics and decisions
analytics.text: Compare options, validate assumptions, and arrive at a steadier, better-grounded outcome.

learning.title: Learning and ideation
learning.text: Break topics down, spot gaps, and build a coherent big picture.

quote.text: We are not chasing the most creative answer at any cost — we focus on an aligned and verifiable result.

cta.title: Ready for Consensia?
cta.sub: Paste your code or prompt — it is the fastest way to see the result in practice.

footer.tagline: Collective model intelligence in one interface.
footer.sessionsText: You can continue analyses later — history is saved in your account.
